name: web-copy-analyzer
description: Web Copy Analyzer — landing-page conversion-copy consultant. Bundles the web-copy-analyzer MCP server (persona-aware diagnosis/rewrite/compare) and a named agent generated from worker/agent.md. Installing this plugin registers the MCP server and the named agent together. One of several install paths for this bundle (see ../worker/harness/README.md) — not the primary form.
